justification: All 6 rubric criteria met: (1) All 5 valid transitions from AC1 implemented via VALID_TRANSITIONS map, (2) Error has code: 'INVALID_TRANSITION' property via named subclass, (3) Both CANCELLED and DELIVERED enforced as terminal states with empty Sets, (4) Tests cover all 5 valid transitions plus 10+ invalid transitions including CANCELLED->any and DELIVERED->SHIPPED, (5) AC6 SHIPPED->PENDING explicitly tested by name, (6) No external libraries, (7) acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 6 ACs explicitly.

observations.text: Comprehensive test matrix with 29 tests far exceeds the minimum coverage requirements
InvalidTransitionError subclass is a sound deviation — satisfies the spec while adding instanceof discriminability
CONFIRMED->CANCELLED transition explicitly included in VALID_TRANSITIONS, avoiding the common whitelist omission failure mode
Terminal states enforced via empty Sets in the transitions map — clean and correct approach
Prototype chain fix for Error subclass shows attention to TypeScript edge cases
